label: Stat part (hyperlinks)
description: Injects hyperlinks to specified ThingDefs into the stat explanation tooltip.

Class.label: Class
Class.description: C# StatPart type used by RimWorld DirectXmlLoader for this list item.

priority.label: Priority
priority.description: Sort order among stat parts. Higher values execute later.

thingDefs.label: Thing defs
thingDefs.description: ThingDefs linked in the stat explanation tooltip.
